description: Fix ad block recovery mechanism: render SoftAdBlockMessage in layout.tsx JSX and integrate AdBlockRecovery as a fallback in AdContainer when ads are blocked.
steps: In app/layout.tsx, the SoftAdBlockMessage component is imported but never rendered in the JSX. Add <SoftAdBlockMessage /> to the body JSX, after <CookieConsent /> and before <BotpressLoader />. It should be a sibling of CookieConsent, outside the <Providers> wrapper since it uses its own hooks internally.

Verify the AdContainer component (components/ads/AdContainer.tsx) already shows AdBlockRecovery when ads are blocked (it does - it imports and renders AdBlockRecovery with forceVisible when adState === 'blocked'). No changes needed to AdContainer itself.
Run `npm run build` to verify no compilation errors.
acceptance_criteria: SoftAdBlockMessage is rendered in the layout.tsx JSX tree (not just imported)
When ad blocking is detected, users see both: (a) the floating toast notification from SoftAdBlockMessage, and (b) the AdBlockRecovery content in place of blocked ads within AdContainer
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm it passes
Grep app/layout.tsx to confirm <SoftAdBlockMessage is present in the return statement (not just as an import)
findings: SoftAdBlockMessage was placed inside Providers (after Footer, before closing Providers tag) because it uses useProStatus() which requires ProStatusProvider context. Build passes successfully. Chart width warnings in build output are pre-existing and unrelated.
